title: Ultra-Realistic Black-And-White High-Fashion Editorial
sourceTitle: Black And White Wide Negative Space High Fashion Editorial AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-realistic black-and-white high-fashion editorial photograph of adult model with sculptural rebellious editorial posture in a wide cinematic studio composition. Subject: adult model with sculptural rebellious editorial posture sits on plain black wooden chair with seated asymmetrically with elongated leg line, angled shoulders, and direct intense gaze, confident intense moody gaze, elongated body lines, and strong fashion attitude while wearing oversized black draped jacket, long monochrome botanical fabric train, glossy black boots, and small pearl necklace. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Wide cinematic frame: model seated far left, large empty negative space on the right, fabric train extending across the floor toward center-right, and dramatic sculptural posture anchoring the composition. Signature Elements: Preserved black and white wide negative space high fashion editorial source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Ultra-realistic black-and-white high-fashion editorial, rebellious magazine cover attitude, monochrome industrial studio, luxury fabric drama, cinematic minimalism, and high-end fashion print finish. Color Palette: Strict black-and-white monochrome, dark oversized blouse or jacket, high-contrast patterned skirt or trailing panel, glossy black boots, pearl necklace whites, concrete grays, and deep shadows. Lighting: Cinematic monochrome lighting with a bright soft-edged diagonal beam crossing background and floor, strong sculptural shadows, polished concrete reflections, and crisp wardrobe texture. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
